summary: Iteration 24: Complete testing of new SportLyo features - ALL PASSED. Tested logo upload flow in boutique, provider messaging (showing all providers), corporate bookings CRUD with payment links, Square payment link generation (MOCKED), and provider dashboard logos tab.

issues: Logo upload section does NOT show amber background when logo is already uploaded (shows white bg-white instead) - minor inconsistency with spec

passed_tests: POST /api/organizer/bookings - creates corporate booking with correct total_amount
PUT /api/organizer/bookings/{id} - updates booking and recalculates total_amount
Bookings section: Empty state with 'AJOUTER' button visible
Bookings section: Dialog opens with all form fields (company_name, team_count, price_per_team, etc.)
Organizer Boutique: Logo upload section visible (data-testid='logo-upload-section')
Organizer Boutique: 'Messagerie prestataire' tab shows 'SportWear Lyon' in sidebar
Organizer Boutique: 'Aucun message — Démarrer la conversation' text visible for provider
Sponsors section: 'Lien paiement' buttons visible on sponsors with amounts
Provider Dashboard: 'Logos organisateurs' tab visible in navigation
Provider Dashboard: Logos section shows 'Club Sportif Paris' logo
Provider Dashboard: 'Télécharger HD' link visible for logo download
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed bookings and sponsors created for testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24: All new features tested successfully. Key endpoints: POST/GET /api/organizer/logo (logo upload), CRUD /api/organizer/bookings (corporate bookings), POST /api/payments/create-link (Square payment links - MOCKED with simulated URL when Square API fails), GET /api/provider/organizer-logos (provider sees organizer logos), GET /api/providers/list (organizer sees all providers for messaging). Boutique section shows all providers in messaging sidebar even without prior conversation history. Logo upload section has white background when logo exists (not amber as specified - minor). Square payment links generate simulated URLs when SQUARE_ACCESS_TOKEN returns error.
mocked_api_note: Square payment links run in SIMULATION mode - generates simulated URL (https://checkout.square.site/simulated/...) when Square API returns error. SumUp payment also MOCKED from previous iterations.

organizer_logo_upload.ui_section: ✅ data-testid='logo-upload-section' visible at top of boutique

provider_messaging_fix.all_providers_visible: ✅ Organizer sees all providers in sidebar even without prior messages

payment_link_generation.sponsors_ui: ✅ 'Lien paiement' buttons visible on sponsors with amounts
payment_link_generation.bookings_ui: ✅ Payment link buttons available in bookings section
